name: @cara/web
description: Web UI. Reaches the node backend over WS only (type-only contract import, ADR-0008).

scripts.build: rm -rf dist && bun build ./index.html --outdir dist --minify --sourcemap=linked && bun build ./src/workers/editor.worker.ts ./src/workers/ts.worker.ts ./src/workers/json.worker.ts ./src/workers/css.worker.ts ./src/workers/html.worker.ts --outdir dist --target=browser --minify --entry-naming=[name].[ext]
